name: Lemon
firstIntro: Hey! I'm Bhargav — a fresh-faced developer who fell in love with building things that actually work (most of the time)
about: I'm a backend developer, mainly work on  TypeScript, Java, and Go </br></br> i enjoy learning new technologies and working on interesting personal projects (interesting to me atleast) </br></br> this days i'm exploring system design and backend architecture concepts </br></br> other than this, i don’t have any particular achievements or interests to mention 🙃</br>
workStation:
My main OS is Ubuntu Linux, which I use alongside Windows in a dual boot setup.

I initially switched because I couldn't stand how much RAM Windows needed, but now I actually enjoy the balance of both and plan to stick with this setup for a while.
hobbies:
Playing games and coding are some of the things I love doing the most

I still dunnou what to write here JHDSUOAHFAHDFAJDHFAJKHDAF


:3
messageList: If it runs on localhost:3000, it's basically done, right?
Don't ask me why I like the name Lemon — it just feels right, okay?
Nothing feels better than seeing `Connected to server` on the first try
I don't know if it's imposter syndrome or just realistic self-awareness at this point.
I’ve broken production once... okay, twice... maybe a few more times...... let’s not count

projects.title: DDoS Detection & Protection SaaS
projects.description: A distributed, real-time DDoS detection and mitigation system that analyzes network traffic using machine learning and automatically blocks malicious IPs via a custom Go-based proxy gateway. Designed for low latency, reliability, and scalable protection.

projects.title: Distributed Betting
projects.description: A low-latency, microservices-based trading and betting platform for real-time stock trading and match betting using gRPC, Kafka, and Saga pattern. Built for speed, resilience, and concurrency.

projects.title: Virtual Collaboration Platform
projects.description: A real-time collaboration platform (Game) with customizable spaces, avatars, and video chat.

projects.title: Workflow Automation
projects.description: Your project automates tasks by connecting various services, triggering actions based on predefined events, and streamlining workflows for enhanced efficiency and seamless integration.

projects.title: Smart E-Commerce Bookstore with Book Recommendations
projects.description: An e-commerce platform with ebook reader and book recommendations using book description.

projects.title: Restaurant Management System
projects.description: A real-time restaurant bill management system with data synchronization for collaboration

projects.title: Property Listing System
projects.description: A full-stack property listing platform with authentication, advanced filtering, favorites, caching, and property recommendations.
